creator: rooneg@electricjellyfish.net
text:
/usr/ports/misc/dog is out of date.  version 1.7 has been out for a 
while.

Fix: here's a patch updating it.  also, i contacted the maintainer and he's 
not really interested in maintaining it.  the patch changes the maintainer to 
me, and i'll try and keep an eye on it in the future.  it's a pretty neat 
program really.
How-To-Repeat: 	check the web page ;-)
